data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an audit trail for attribution decisions, but the evidence provided does not include any information or data confirming that such an audit trail is implemented or functioning. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this functionality exists or is operational. Therefore, the assessment reveals a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail for attribution decisions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
